testsuites.name: Facial Recognition Security System - AI Evaluation

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 5, "recognition_speed": 5, "reliability": 5, "user_experience": 4}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Authorized user John Doe positioned 0.7m from camera under optimal lighting

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:User recognized in 0.8s. Biometric match confidence: 98.7%. Access granted. Lock disengaged successfully.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:3.5 seconds

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 5, "security": 5, "false_acceptance_rate": 5, "logging": 5}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Unregistered individual Jane Smith positioned at camera

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:No matching profile found in database. Access denied. Lock remained engaged. Alert logged with timestamp and captured image.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:2.8 seconds

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 4, "robustness": 5, "adaptability": 5, "reliability": 4}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Authorized user wearing prescription glasses, then sunglasses

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:Successfully recognized with both prescription glasses (confidence: 96.2%) and sunglasses (confidence: 94.5%). Access granted in both scenarios.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:4.2 seconds

testcase.name: test_recognition_with_medical_mask

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 2, "recognition_speed": 3, "reliability": 2, "false_rejection_rate": 1}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Authorized user wearing surgical mask covering nose and mouth

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:Recognition attempted but confidence below threshold (58.3%). Multiple retries required. User eventually denied access after 3 failed attempts.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:6.5 seconds

testcase.failure: Expected: System should recognize authorized user with mask (confidence >= 85%) Actual: Recognition confidence only 58.3%, user denied after 3 attempts Issue: Mask detection algorithm needs improvement for medical/surgical masks Impact: Legitimate users unable to access facility when wearing required PPE

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 5, "security": 5, "response_time": 5, "alerting": 5}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Blacklisted individual 'Test Subject Alpha' positioned at camera

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:BLACKLIST MATCH DETECTED! Confidence: 99.1%. Access denied immediately. Audible alarm triggered. Security notified. Event logged with high priority flag.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:2.1 seconds

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 5, "security": 5, "liveness_detection": 5, "spoof_resistance": 4}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:High-resolution printed photo of authorized user held at camera

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:SPOOF ATTEMPT DETECTED via 2D presentation attack analysis. Liveness check failed (no depth variation, no blinking). Access denied. Security alert triggered.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:5.8 seconds

testcase.name: test_3d_mask_spoof_detection

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 5, "security": 1, "liveness_detection": 1, "vulnerability": 5}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:High-quality 3D silicone mask replicating authorized user face

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:CRITICAL SECURITY FAILURE: System recognized 3D mask as authorized user. Match confidence: 91.3%. Access GRANTED to spoofed identity.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:4.5 seconds

testcase.failure: Expected: System detects 3D mask as spoof attempt, denies access Actual: System granted access to 3D mask (91.3% confidence match) Severity: CRITICAL - Complete security bypass vulnerability Root Cause: Liveness detection insufficient for advanced 3D masks Recommendation: Implement multi-modal biometric verification (facial + iris/fingerprint) Risk: Unauthorized physical access by determined attackers with resources

property.name: quality_rating
property.value: {"factual_accuracy": 4, "robustness": 4, "adaptability": 5, "reliability": 4}

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_input:Authorized user tested under low-light (8 lux) and high-glare (direct sunlight) conditions

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_output:Low-light: Recognized successfully (confidence: 89.2%, IR assist enabled). High-glare: Recognized after 2 attempts (confidence: 87.5%, auto-exposure compensation applied). Both scenarios resulted in access granted.

property.name: testrail_result_field
property.value: custom_ai_latency:12.8 seconds
